description_long: This town hall is a stately, rectangular building with a green hipped roof and multiple brick chimneys. The facade features tall, arched windows with white framing, and the lower portion of the building is accented with a beige base. Decorative cornices and pilasters add classical detail to the white upper facade, while the side wings are slightly set back and include small balconies. The main entrance is centrally located on the longer side, marked by a set of double doors and a modest staircase. The structure sits on a raised platform, suggesting a formal and prominent civic presence.
description: A grand, rectangular town hall with a green hipped roof, white and beige facade, arched windows, and classical decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and prominent classical facade details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's depth, green roof, and a small balcony on the left wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a secondary entrance, more arched windows, and the building's overall symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the side extension and the uninterrupted roofline.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: Decorative cornices, pilasters, and arched window frames with classical moldings.
attribute_entrance_design: Single main entrance with double doors, framed by pilasters and a modest staircase, no portico.
